article.title: Uber | L4 | Bengaluru
article.content:
Location: Bengaluru
Years of Experience: 3.7

Current Compensation: 58 LPA

Company: Uber
Level: L4
Offer date: Feb 2026
Base: 43.5 + 2.5(PF) = 46 LPA
Performance bonus: 7.4 LPA for meets bar rating (can be upto 2x)
Stocks: 65k USD over 4 years (front loaded), ~20.5 Y1, ~16.5 Y2
Sign-on bonus: 4.8L

Total compensation: Y1: ~78.7, Y2: ~69.9 

Standard Benefits: (wellness, uber credits & phone allowance)

Accepted the offer.
